parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { session_id: $json.session_id, role: 'user', message: $json.question, metadata: { source: 'agent_query_main', user_id: $json.user_id }, token: $json.token } }}

parameters.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    LOWER('{{$json.question_plain_sql}}') AS q,
    NULLIF(TRIM('{{$json.question_terms_sql}}'), '') AS terms,
    plainto_tsquery('russian', '{{$json.question_ts_sql}}') AS q_ru,
    plainto_tsquery('simple', '{{$json.question_ts_sql}}') AS q_simple
),
source_rows AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(to_jsonb(t) ->> '{{$json.wiki_title_column_sql}}', '') AS title,
    COALESCE(to_jsonb(t) ->> '{{$json.wiki_path_column_sql}}', '') AS path,
    COALESCE(to_jsonb(t) ->> '{{$json.wiki_content_column_sql}}', '') AS content
  FROM {{$json.wiki_schema_sql}}.{{$json.wiki_table_sql}} t
  WHERE COALESCE(to_jsonb(t) ->> '{{$json.wiki_content_column_sql}}', '') <> ''
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    s.title,
    s.path,
    s.content,
    ts_rank_cd(
      setweight(to_tsvector('russian', s.title), 'A') ||
      setweight(to_tsvector('russian', s.content), 'B'),
      p.q_ru
    ) AS fts_rank,
    ts_rank_cd(to_tsvector('simple', s.path), p.q_simple) AS path_rank,
    CASE
      WHEN s.title <> '' AND LOWER(s.title) LIKE '%' || p.q || '%' THEN 3
      WHEN s.path <> '' AND LOWER(s.path) LIKE '%' || p.q || '%' THEN 2
      WHEN LOWER(s.content) LIKE '%' || p.q || '%' THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS exact_rank,
    COALESCE((
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM UNNEST(string_to_array(p.terms, ' ')) AS term
      WHERE length(term) >= 2
        AND (
          LOWER(s.title) LIKE '%' || term || '%'
          OR LOWER(s.path) LIKE '%' || term || '%'
          OR LOWER(s.content) LIKE '%' || term || '%'
          OR LOWER(s.title) LIKE '%' || LEFT(term, 4) || '%'
          OR LOWER(s.path) LIKE '%' || LEFT(term, 4) || '%'
          OR LOWER(s.content) LIKE '%' || LEFT(term, 4) || '%'
        )
    ), 0) AS term_hits
  FROM source_rows s
  CROSS JOIN params p
),
matched AS (
  SELECT
    title,
    path,
    content,
    term_hits,
    (fts_rank * 10.0 + path_rank * 7.0 + exact_rank * 6.0 + term_hits * 2.0)::numeric AS score
  FROM ranked
  WHERE term_hits > 0 OR fts_rank > 0 OR path_rank > 0 OR exact_rank > 0
  ORDER BY score DESC, term_hits DESC, LENGTH(content) DESC
  LIMIT {{$json.limit}}
)
SELECT title, path, content, score, term_hits
FROM matched
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS title, '' AS path, '' AS content, 0::numeric AS score, 0::int AS term_hits
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM matched);

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $json.ollama_model, prompt: $json.prompt, stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1 } } }}

={{ { session_id: $json.session_id, role: 'assistant', message: $json.answer, metadata: { source: 'agent_query_main', model: $json.ollama_model, trace_id: $json.trace_id, guard_reason: $json.guard_reason, memory_count: Number($json.memory_count ?? 0) }, token: $json.token } }}
